definition: A named mathematical place for a coefficient, source, sink, residual, or variable in the model architecture.
allowed_use: Use to define structure and where evidence attaches.
forbidden_use: Treat the slot as an admitted coefficient because it has a symbol.

definition: Closure or term has passed split, source/property, runtime-input, uncertainty, and term-specific admission gates for its stated scope.
Evidence explains mechanism, residual ownership, model-form limits, or future study design but is not a predictive runtime input.
allowed_use: Use for CFD reductions, visuals, blocked candidates, negative results.
forbidden_use: Use as closure coefficient or final score input.

definition: A row or quantity has a named unresolved blocker for the intended claim.
allowed_use: Use to make limitations and future work precise.
forbidden_use: Rewrite as missing prose or hide inside a fitted multiplier.

definition: Eligible for fitting under the split and term-specific gates.
allowed_use: Use only for final training rows and released quantities.
forbidden_use: Fit on holdout/external or diagnostic rows.

definition: May evaluate a frozen model but cannot fit/tune/select model form.
allowed_use: Use for holdout/testing and external-test roles.
forbidden_use: Use to choose or tune coefficients.

definition: Allowed as an input when running a predictive model because it is setup-known or previously admitted.
allowed_use: Use for geometry, property mode, setup heater/cooler/external boundary inputs, admitted coefficients.
forbidden_use: Use target-derived CFD response from the scored row.

definition: Use of prohibited target-derived or protected information as an input to a claimed predictive runtime model.
allowed_use: Use as a guardrail term and audit category.
forbidden_use: Relax for convenience or to improve final score.

definition: Pressure residual assigned to a section or cluster when component isolation/recovery requirements are not met.
allowed_use: Use for current recirculating corner/two-tap evidence.
forbidden_use: Rename as ordinary component K/F6 admission.

definition: Segment-local marker that ordinary single-stream assumptions may be invalid due to reverse flow or exchange behavior.
allowed_use: Use to disable ordinary Nu/f_D/K language and motivate exchange-lane studies.
forbidden_use: Treat the flag as an admitted exchange coefficient.
